rules.rule: Do not publish any asset with Unknown rights status or unknown license.
Public-domain and Library of Congress items require item-level rights confirmation and attribution display.
Respect moral rights, database rights, and attribution expectations even for public-domain reproductions.
Require sensitivity review and partner clearance before publication or product use.
Species data does not clear image rights; use rights-cleared images only.
Site recognition does not grant image, trademark, or reproduction rights.
